acrostic: END OF JUDAH PROPHESIED AND THEN A NEW TEMPLE IN JERUSALEM

3.acrostic: DO EAT THE SCROLL OF LAMENTATION

7.acrostic: UNLEASH WRATH FOR THE END IS HERE

8.acrostic: DIG IN THE WALL AND SEE

10.acrostic: HE SAW THE GLORY DEPART NOW

11.acrostic: PUT A NEW HEART INTO YOUR FLESH

12.acrostic: REMOVE YOUR BAGGAGE THRU THE WALL

13.acrostic: ON PROPHETS WHO SEE A VISION

14.acrostic: PUT AWAY YOUR IDOLS OF HEART

16.acrostic: EXPOSED AS INFANT BUT I WASHED YOU AND MADE YOU ROYAL YET YOU PLAYED THE WHORE

17.acrostic: SPRIG OF CEDAR PLANTED ON TOP

18.acrostic: I JUDGE EACH ONE ACCORDING TO HIS WORKS

20.acrostic: DID REBEL IN EGYPT WILDERNESS YET I SPARED THEM FOR MY NAMES

21.acrostic: A SWORD A SWORD SHARPENED AND POLISHED

22.acrostic: NOW THE CITY IS FULL OF BLOOD AND DROSS

23.acrostic: DAUGHTERS OHOLAH OHOLIBAH PLAYED THE WHORE LOVED ASSYRIA

24.acrostic: THIS POT IS BOILING THE WIFE DIED

26.acrostic: END OF TYRE IS A BARE ROCKS

27.acrostic: NOW LAMENT FOR TYRE BEAUTIFUL SHIP SINKING

28.acrostic: AGAINST THE KING OF TYRE IN EDEN

30.acrostic: EGYPT WILL FALL BY THE SWORD NOW

32.acrostic: THEY SHALL LIE WITH THE UNCIRCUMCISED

33.acrostic: EZEKIEL IS WATCHMAN TO THE HOUSE ISRAEL

34.acrostic: MY SHEEP WANDERED ON EVERY MOUNTAINS

36.acrostic: LAND TILLED AND SOWN AND I WILL MULTIPLY FLOCK

37.acrostic: EZEKIEL PROPHESY TO DRY BONES NOW

38.acrostic: I AM AGAINST YOU GOG MY ENEMY

39.acrostic: NOW I WILL RESTORE JACOBS FORTUNES

40.acrostic: JUST MAN WITH MEASURING REED MEASURED THE GATES AND COURTS

41.acrostic: ENTERED NAVE AND THE HOLY PLACE

43.acrostic: UNDERSTAND THE LAW OF THE HOUSES

44.acrostic: SHALL NOT GO INTO THE INNER COURTS NOW

46.acrostic: LOOK AT THE PLACE OF BOILINGS

48.acrostic: MY CITY GATES ARE NAMED FOR THE TRIBES HERE
